name: Hidili Industry International Development Limited
summary: Hidili Industry International Development Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the coal mining, and manufacture and sale of raw coal and clean coal in the People's Republic of China. It also provides clean coal washing services. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Panzhihua, the People's Republic of China. Hidili Industry International Development Limited is a subsidiary of Sanlian Investment Holding Limited.
